data.title: Planet Lunch News
256 BTC redeemed after Babylon airdrop, high transaction fees attract attention
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to mempool founder mononaut, after Babylon released the token airdrop, 256 BTC have been redeemed (cancelled) from Babylon in the past 24 hours. The redemption transaction paid a total of 1.35 BTC in fees and consumed 1.318 MvB of block space.
Mononaut believes that the reason for the high redemption transaction fee may be that the script for unstaking is large, and for some reason, the protocol locked a fixed fee rate selected a few months ago, which may be a pre-signed transaction.

data.title: Musk retweeted F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun's space flight record tweet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that F2Pool co-founder Wang Chun updated his fourth day of space flight record on the X platform, which was forwarded by Musk. Wang Chun wrote in the post, "I woke up early and watched the launch of Starlink Group 11-13 on YouTube. Soon after, SpaceX contacted us to inform us that we would fly over Mongolia during the second stage deorbit burn. We opened the launch capsule and tried to observe the process, but failed. Nevertheless, we flew from the Bay of Bengal to the Arctic, enjoying the beautiful scenery all the way."

data.title: U.S. Employment Data to Influence Federal Reserve's Monetary Policy
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the United States is set to release its March non-farm payroll (NFP) data today, which is expected to be a key indicator for the Federal Reserve's future monetary policy decisions. Market expectations suggest that if the data is weak, the Federal Reserve may accelerate interest rate cuts, potentially benefiting the cryptocurrency market. Conversely, strong data could negatively impact risk assets.

The anticipated non-farm payroll figure is 139,000, down from the previous 151,000. The unemployment rate is expected to be 4.2%, slightly higher than the previous 4.1%. The average hourly earnings month-on-month growth rate is projected at 0.4%, compared to the previous 0.3%.

Analysts from Bitunx advise that a weak employment market will strengthen expectations for interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve within the year, enhancing market liquidity and the performance of risk assets. Bitcoin is currently focusing on short-term support at 80,000 and long-term support at 78,000. Recently, the cryptocurrency market has been affected by U.S. President Donald Trump's tariff policies and global economic slowdown expectations, leading to increased market volatility. Investors are advised to manage risks carefully, avoid excessive positions in a single direction, and ensure proper asset allocation to mitigate market risks.

data.title: Blockchain gaming platform Ultra completes $12 million in financing, with NOIA Capital participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Blockchain gaming platform Ultra announced the completion of a new round of financing of US$12 million. Luxembourg-based NOIA Capital participated in the investment through its digital asset fund. In addition, the company also announced the appointment of Maxime van Steenberghe, former partner of Circle Strategies, as chief operating officer. The new funds will be used to support its construction of a blockchain-based game distribution platform similar to Stream, and will also recruit talent, expand and upgrade the platform, and make strategic acquisitions.

data.title: Altcoins are set for one last big rally, but just a few will benefit — Analyst
data.description:
Altcoins may have just one last rally this cycle, but only those with real utility and strong network activity will see price gains, according to an analyst.  “I think there will be one more breadth thrust from altcoins. The question is, is it a sustained rally that we will see for six to twelve months,” Real Vision chief crypto analyst Jamie Coutts told Real Vision co-founder Raoul Pal on an April 3 X livestream. Network activity will be the ‘north star’ for how to trade crypto“At this stage, I am not too sure, but I do believe that quality altcoins where activity returns, activity drives prices …we will definitely see a recovery in some of these more high-quality names,” Coutts said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/altcoins-one-last-rally-network-activity-big-signal-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
